# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# ARM Template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity
# Following principle of least privilege - using specific, scoped role assignments
# instead of broad wildcard permissions to prevent IAM misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure Function App
    minLength: 2
    maxLength: 60

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Storage Account
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24

  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24

  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Cosmos DB Account
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 44

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Server

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database

  appServicePlanSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Y1
    allowedValues:
      - Y1
      - EP1
      - EP2
      - EP3
    metadata:
      description: SKU for the App Service Plan

  cosmosDbDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Cosmos DB database

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: production
    allowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    metadata:
      description: Deployment environment

variables:
  appServicePlanName: "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]"
  applicationInsightsName: "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-insights')]"
  functionStorageAccountName: "[concat('fn', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName')))]"

  # Specific least-privilege role definition IDs
  # SECURITY: Using narrowly-scoped roles instead of broad/wildcard roles like Owner or Contributor
  # Each role grants only the minimum permissions needed for the function's operations

  # Storage Blob Data Reader - read blobs only (not full Storage Account Contributor)
  storageBlobDataReaderRoleId: 2a2b9908-6ea1-4ae2-8e65-a410df84e7d1

  # Storage Queue Data Message Processor - process queue messages only
  storageQueueDataMessageProcessorRoleId: 8a0f0c08-91a1-4084-bc3d-661d67233fed

  # Storage Table Data Reader - read table data only
  storageTableDataReaderRoleId: 76199698-9eea-4c19-bc75-cec21354c6b6

  # Key Vault Secrets User - read secrets only (not Key Vault Administrator)
  keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId: 4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6

  # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Reader - read Cosmos DB data only (not Contributor)
  # For write access, use specific Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor scoped to containers
  cosmosDbDataReaderRoleId: fbdf93bf-df7d-467e-a4d2-9458aa1360c8

  # Unique role assignment names using deterministic GUIDs
  storageBlobRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]"
  storageQueueRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageQueueDataMessageProcessorRoleId'))]"
  storageTableRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageTableDataReaderRoleId'))]"
  keyVaultRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]"

resources:
  # Application Insights for monitoring
  - type: Microsoft.Insights/components
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02"
    name: "[variables('applicationInsightsName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: web
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      Application_Type: web
      DisableIpMasking: false
      DisableLocalAuth: true
      publicNetworkAccessForIngestion: Enabled
      publicNetworkAccessForQuery: Enabled
      RetentionInDays: 90

  # Storage Account for Function App runtime (separate from application storage)
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[variables('functionStorageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: function-runtime
      managedBy: arm-template
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      allowSharedKeyAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          file:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          table:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          queue:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage

  # App Service Plan (Consumption or Premium)
  - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: "2022-09-01"
    name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]"
      tier: "[if(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'Y1'), 'Dynamic', 'ElasticPremium')]"
    properties:
      reserved: true

  # Function App with System-Assigned Managed Identity
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: "2022-09-01"
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: functionapp,linux
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('applicationInsightsName'))]"
    # SECURITY: System-assigned managed identity - automatically lifecycle-managed
    # Preferred over user-assigned for single-purpose identities
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      clientAffinityEnabled: false
      siteConfig:
        linuxFxVersion: DOTNET-ISOLATED|8.0
        ftpsState: Disabled
        minTlsVersion: "1.2"
        http20Enabled: true
        # SECURITY: Disable remote debugging in all environments
        remoteDebuggingEnabled: false
        appSettings:
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName
            value: "[variables('functionStorageAccountName')]"
          # SECURITY: Using identity-based connection (no connection string/keys)
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage__credential
            value: managedidentity
          - name: FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION
            value: "~4"
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet-isolated
          - name: APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('applicationInsightsName'))).ConnectionString]"
          # SECURITY: Reference Key Vault secrets via managed identity, not stored in app settings
          - name: KeyVaultUri
            value: "[concat('https://', parameters('keyVaultName'), '.vault.azure.net/')]"
          # SECURITY: Use identity-based Cosmos DB connection
          - name: CosmosDbEndpoint
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))).documentEndpoint]"
          - name: CosmosDbDatabaseName
            value: "[parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName')]"
          # SECURITY: SQL connection using managed identity authentication
          - name: SqlConnectionString
            value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Database=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;')]"
          - name: StorageAccountName
            value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"

  # Key Vault with RBAC authorization (no access policies)
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      # SECURITY: Use RBAC for Key Vault access control instead of access policies
      enableRbacAuthorization: true
      enableSoftDelete: true
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: 90
      enablePurgeProtection: true
      # SECURITY: Restrict network access
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
      publicNetworkAccess: disabled

  # Cosmos DB Account with minimal configuration
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: GlobalDocumentDB
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
      consistencyPolicy:
        defaultConsistencyLevel: Session
      locations:
        - locationName: "[parameters('location')]"
          failoverPriority: 0
          isZoneRedundant: false
      # SECURITY: Disable key-based authentication, enforce RBAC only
      disableLocalAuth: true
      # SECURITY: Disable public network access for production
      publicNetworkAccess: "[if(equals(parameters('environment'), 'production'), 'Disabled', 'Enabled')]"
      networkAclBypass: AzureServices
      enableAutomaticFailover: false
      enableMultipleWriteLocations: false
      minimalTlsVersion: Tls12

  # Cosmos DB Database
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlDatabases
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/', parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      resource:
        id: "[parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName')]"

  # Application Storage Account (for application data, separate from function runtime)
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: application-data
      managedBy: arm-template
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      # SECURITY: Disable shared key access to enforce AAD-only authentication
      allowSharedKeyAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          file:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          table:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          queue:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage

  # SQL Server
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      # SECURITY: Use AAD-only authentication, no SQL auth
      administrators:
        azureADOnlyAuthentication: true
        administratorType: ActiveDirectory
        login: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
        sid: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
        tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"

  # SQL Database
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    sku:
      name: S0
      tier: Standard
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      zoneRedundant: false
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"

  # ============================================================================
  # ROLE ASSIGNMENTS - Principle of Least Privilege
  # SECURITY: Each assignment grants only the specific permissions needed.
  # Scoped to individual resources, NOT resource group or subscription level.
  # ============================================================================

  # Storage Blob Data Reader on application storage account
  # SECURITY: Read-only blob access. If write is needed, use Storage Blob Data Contributor
  # scoped to specific containers via separate assignments.
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageBlobRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      # SECURITY: Adding description and condition for auditability
      description: "Allow Function App to read blob data from application storage"

  # Storage Queue Data Message Processor on application storage account
  # SECURITY: Can only read/process/delete queue messages, cannot create queues or manage storage
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageQueueRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageQueueDataMessageProcessorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Allow Function App to process queue messages from application storage"

  # Storage Table Data Reader on application storage account
  # SECURITY: Read-only table access
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageTableRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageTableDataReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Allow Function App to read table data from application storage"

  # Function runtime storage - blob and queue access for WebJobs
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'runtime-blob')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      # Storage Blob Data Owner - needed for function runtime lease management
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b7e6dc6d-f1e8-4753-8033-0f276bb0955b')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function runtime blob access for lease management and triggers"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'runtime-queue')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      # Storage Queue Data Contributor - needed for function runtime queue management
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function runtime queue access for trigger management"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'runtime-table')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      # Storage Table Data Contributor - needed for function runtime timer triggers
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function runtime table access for timer trigger management"

  # Key Vault Secrets User - read secrets only
  # SECURITY: NOT Key Vault Administrator or Key Vault Contributor
  # Cannot manage vault configuration, create/delete secrets, or access keys/certificates
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('keyVaultRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Allow Function App to read secrets from Key Vault"

  # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Reader - Cosmos DB native RBAC
  # SECURITY: Read-only data plane access. Scoped to the specific database.
  # Cannot modify database configuration, create/delete containers, or write data.
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/', guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'cosmos-reader'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlDatabases', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName'))]"
    properties:
      # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Reader role
      roleDefinitionId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleDefinitions', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      # SECURITY: Scoped to specific database, not entire account
      scope: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), '/dbs/', parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName'))]"

  # Diagnostic settings for audit logging on Key Vault
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: "2021-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/audit')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('applicationInsightsName'))]"
    properties:
      logs:
        - category: AuditEvent
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
      metrics:
        - category: AllMetrics
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90

outputs:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"

  functionAppPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"

  functionAppDefaultHostName:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))).defaultHostName]"

  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"

  cosmosDbEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))).documentEndpoint]"

  securityNotes:
    type: string
    value: "IMPORTANT: This template follows least-privilege principles. All role assignments are scoped to specific resources. Storage Blob Data Reader (not Contributor), Key Vault Secrets User (not Administrator), Cosmos DB Data Reader (scoped to database). SQL access uses AAD-only auth. Add write roles only when specific functions require them, scoped to the narrowest resource possible."

  additionalPermissionsGuidance:
    type: string
    value: "To add write permissions for specific microservices, create separate role assignments scoped to specific containers/collections. For example, use Storage Blob Data Contributor scoped to a specific container, or Cosmos DB Data Contributor scoped to a specific collection. Never use Owner, Contributor, or User Access Administrator roles on service principals."
